---
title: "Accessibility"
subtitle: "(this is just the accessibility page rendered as slides instead)"
author: ""
date: ""
image: "https://accessibility.umich.edu/sites/default/files/ChatGPT%20Image%20Oct%207%2C%202025%2C%2007_50_46%20AM.png" # <-- image to be used in links to slides
image-alt: Digital Accessibility graphic # <- alt text for accessibility
format:
 revealjs: # see https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/
   incremental: false # <-- "true" = bullets and numbers to appear incrementally by default
   scrollable: true
   theme: [../michigan.scss]
footer: "👈 Click on Block M for menu | [Return to the website](index.qmd)"
---

{{< include ../accessibility.qmd >}}
